issuer_name_as_stated: Yatharth Hospital & Trauma Care Services Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports against rows of 2 criminal proceedings against the Company, 1 against other Directors, 2 against Promoters and 1 against Subsidiaries, for 6 criminal proceedings in total; all “By” rows are excluded. No statutory/regulatory proceedings or tax proceedings are reported in the against rows, and the quantified group matters counted are ₹5.00 million against the Company plus ₹0.74 million against Subsidiaries; the ₹0.74 million against Promoters is excluded as a personal matter, giving ₹5.74 million, or ₹0.574 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹2,358.44 million as at March 31, 2023, not a re-sum of line items, converted to ₹235.844 crore. The only concentration percentages shown are company-wide revenue-from-operations percentages for COVID-19 revenue, not top-five or top-ten customer concentration; the specialty percentages are business-segment concentration and therefore are not used. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 100 (₹1 million = ₹0.01 crore).
